metadata.description: Name prefix for all resources (CAF naming). 3-15 chars, lowercase, hyphens allowed. Example: gib-contoso-prod
Azure region for deployment.
Build and maintain a Windows Server 2022 golden image.
Build and maintain a Windows Server 2025 golden image.
Build and maintain a Windows 11 Multi-Session golden image (AVD pooled hosts).
Build and maintain a Windows 11 Single-Session golden image (AVD personal / standard VMs).
Build and maintain an Ubuntu 22.04 LTS golden image.
Build and maintain an Ubuntu 24.04 LTS golden image.
Build and maintain a RHEL 8 golden image.
Build and maintain a RHEL 9 golden image.
Install Azure Monitor Agent during image build.
Install Microsoft Defender for Endpoint prerequisites during image build.
Apply CIS-aligned security hardening.
Apply AVD-specific optimizations (FSLogix, Teams, OS tweaks). Applied to Win11 images only.
Base URL for Windows PowerShell customization scripts.
Base URL for Linux shell customization scripts.
Use a private Azure Blob container for scripts instead of GitHub.
Day of month to run the scheduled build (1-28). Default 15 = ~3 days after Patch Tuesday.
Hour (UTC) to start the scheduled build (0-23). Default 2 = 02:00 UTC.
Inject the AIB build VM into a customer VNet.
Email address for build success/failure notifications. Leave empty to disable.
Deploy a Log Analytics workspace for build monitoring.
Additional Azure regions to replicate image versions into.
Azure region for the managed identities.
CAF name prefix. Drives resource names.
Azure region for the gallery.
CAF name prefix.
Azure region.
CAF name prefix.
Short OS identifier: ws2022 | ws2025 | win11-ms | win11-ss
True for Windows 10/11 images — enables AVD-specific customization path.
Resource ID of the AIB user-assigned managed identity.
Name of the Azure Compute Gallery.
Base URL for PowerShell scripts (raw GitHub path or blob container URL).
Additional replication regions beyond the deployment region.

variables.agentSteps: [if(or(parameters('installAzureMonitorAgent'), parameters('installDefenderForEndpoint')), createArray(createObject('type', 'PowerShell', 'name', 'InstallAgents', 'scriptUri', format('{0}/install-agents.ps1', parameters('scriptBaseUrl')), 'runElevated', true(), 'runAsSystem', true(), 'validExitCodes', createArray(0, 3010))), createArray())]
variables.securitySteps: [if(parameters('enableSecurityHardening'), createArray(createObject('type', 'PowerShell', 'name', 'SecurityHardening', 'scriptUri', format('{0}/security-hardening.ps1', parameters('scriptBaseUrl')), 'runElevated', true(), 'runAsSystem', true())), createArray())]
variables.avdSteps: [if(and(parameters('isAvd'), parameters('enableAvdOptimizations')), createArray(createObject('type', 'PowerShell', 'name', 'AvdOptimizations', 'scriptUri', format('{0}/avd-optimizations.ps1', parameters('scriptBaseUrl')), 'runElevated', true(), 'runAsSystem', true())), createArray())]
variables.vmProfile: [if(parameters('useVNetInjection'), union(variables('vmProfileBase'), createObject('vnetConfig', createObject('subnetId', resourceId(parameters('vnetResourceGroupName'), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))))), variables('vmProfileBase'))]

metadata.description: Azure region.
CAF name prefix.
Short OS identifier — used in resource names.
Resource ID of the AIB user-assigned managed identity.
Name of the Azure Compute Gallery.
Base URL for shell customization scripts.
Azure region.
CAF name prefix.
Resource ID of the Logic App user-assigned managed identity.
Names of the AIB image templates to trigger on each run.
Day of month for the scheduled build (1-28).
Hour (UTC) for the scheduled build (0-23).
Azure subscription ID where AIB templates live.

variables.runnerActions: [toObject(parameters('imageTemplateNames'), lambda('templateName', format('Run_{0}', replace(lambdaVariables('templateName'), '-', '_'))), lambda('templateName', createObject('type', 'Http', 'runAfter', createObject(), 'inputs', createObject('method', 'POST', 'uri', format('{0}subscriptions/{1}/resourceGroups/{2}/providers/Microsoft.VirtualMachineImages/imageTemplates/{3}/run?api-version=2024-02-01', variables('armBaseUrl'), parameters('subscriptionId'), parameters('resourceGroupName'), lambdaVariables('templateName')), 'authentication', createObject('type', 'ManagedServiceIdentity', 'identity', parameters('logicAppIdentityId'), 'audience', variables('armBaseUrl'))))))]

metadata.description: Azure region.
CAF name prefix.
Principal ID of the AIB UAMI — granted Storage Blob Data Reader.
GitHub raw base URL to download scripts from during deployment. Example: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/org/repo/branch/path/scripts
List of script file names to download from source and upload to blob storage.
Optional second base URL for scripts from a different OS path (e.g. Linux scripts in a combined deployment).
Script file names to download from the secondary base URL.

properties.scriptContent:
#!/bin/bash
      set -e
      upload_script() {
        local base_url="$1" script="$2"
        echo "Downloading ${script}..."
        curl -sLf "${base_url}/${script}" -o "/tmp/${script}" || { echo "Failed to download ${script}"; exit 1; }
        echo "Uploading ${script}..."
        az storage blob upload \
          --account-name "${STORAGE_ACCOUNT}" \
          --container-name "scripts" \
          --name "${script}" \
          --file "/tmp/${script}" \
          --auth-mode login \
          --overwrite true
      }
      IFS=' ' read -ra SCRIPTS <<< "$SCRIPT_FILE_NAMES"
      for script in "${SCRIPTS[@]}"; do upload_script "$SCRIPT_BASE_URL" "$script"; done
      if [ -n "${SECONDARY_SCRIPT_BASE_URL}" ]; then
        IFS=' ' read -ra SEC_SCRIPTS <<< "$SECONDARY_SCRIPT_FILE_NAMES"
        for script in "${SEC_SCRIPTS[@]}"; do upload_script "$SECONDARY_SCRIPT_BASE_URL" "$script"; done
      fi
      echo "All scripts uploaded successfully."
